category_sources: Official npm/node-semver repository describes it as the semver parser for Node.
source_facts.description says semver is the semantic version parser for Node used by npm.
display_name_sources: Official repository name and README use semver.
docs_sources: Official npm/node-semver GitHub README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/npm/node-semver, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supports semantic-versioning, Node.js, npm, and parser tags.
